text.title: 1:1 Question Bank by Tenure Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces, plus one valid and one invalid example, and a closed list of forbidden patterns the validator must reject.

list.pattern: buckets missing any of '0-30d', '31-60d', '61-90d', '4-6mo', '6mo+' — violates r1
any bucket has <10 questions — violates r2
any question starts with 'are you' / 'do you' (yes/no shape) — violates r3

example.code: { "artefact_id": "1on1-question-bank-2026-q2", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "buckets": { "0-30d": [ "What's missing that I haven't realised yet?", "What surprised you about onboarding?", "Where do you feel most stuck right now?", "What's one thing that's better than expected?", "Which doc was the most useful?", "Which doc made no sense?", "Who haven't you met yet?", "What's your biggest question I haven't answered?", "What pace feels sustainable for you?", "What's slowing you down?" ], "31-60d": [ "Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5", "Q6", "Q7", "Q8", "Q9", "Q10" ], "61-90d": [ "Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5", "Q6", "Q7", "Q8", "Q9", "Q10" ], "4-6mo": [ "Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5", "Q6", "Q7", "Q8", "Q9", "Q10" ], "6mo+": [ "Q1", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5", "Q6", "Q7", "Q8", "Q9", "Q10" ] }, "owner": "@ruslan" }
example.note: Minimum viable conformant output — every required field present, no forbidden pattern matched.
Invalid — required fields missing or forbidden patterns matched (e.g. owner=='team').
